todos.description: Set up Python infrastructure with uv for scikit-learn clustering
Create Python batch processing script for dreamsign extraction
Create SQLite tables for storing analysis results
Add Go repository methods for analysis storage and retrieval
Add list-view s keybinding and analysis view state transition
Implement cache-first analysis loading with empty-state fallback and local-time timestamp formatting
Integrate async Python re-run flow from analysis view with minimum-dream guardrail and result persistence
Render full analysis UI states (loading, success, too-few-dreams, execution failure, parse failure) while preserving prior cache on errors
Add end-to-end validation tests and acceptance checklist coverage for navigation, caching, rerun, and timezone correctness
